text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is feeling under the weather,
so I send her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'm so disappointed in myself...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, nothing left to do but rest up so I can get
back to practice as soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wait... Is this... my parents' house?

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text:
You're finally awake. The curry's ready, so come
get some.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Curry...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay, okay!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Second Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text:
Do you want the mild or spicy version? Hang on, I
know. You want the spicy curry, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want the mild version! Stop messing with me
when you already know what I want!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text:
All right, you two, no fighting. Chiyo, can you
serve the salad?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okaaay.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text: Ew, I don't want salad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Too bad. You can't skip your greens all the time!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone. Let's eat.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks for the food!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Mm! It's so mild, rich, and yummy. Our family
curry is the best!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text:
There's still plenty left, so have as much as you
want.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I will! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I-I fell asleep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... I feel like I had a really cozy dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Sakura Chiyono O's nap has completely
cleared up her exhaustion, and she's back to her
normal self in no time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ack! This is so spicy!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Second Oldest Brother
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Sorry, I mixed them up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Water... Water!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wateeer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh... It was just a dream. Phew, that scared me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is shaken by her dream and
doesn't get much rest.
